component.name: Al Hadith
component.summary: A beautiful Hadith application with search and bookmarking features

description.p: Al Hadith is a comprehensive, modern, and beautiful Hadith application designed to help users read, search, and bookmark Hadith with ease.

ul.li: Bookmark and organize your favorite Hadiths.
Beautiful and user-friendly interface with customizable fonts.

screenshot.caption: Main screen of Al Hadith application
